title: Enphase Energy Q1 2021 Earnings Preview
text: Enphase Energy Q1 2021 earnings preview scheduled for April 27 after market close showed consensus EPS Estimate of $0.43 (+13.2% Y/Y) and consensus Revenue Estimate of $291.64M (+41.9% Y/Y) with expected adjusted gross margin of 38.9%. Over prior 2 years, ENPH beat EPS estimates 100% and beat revenue estimates 100% of time. Over prior 3 months, EPS estimates saw 12 upward revisions and 2 downward while revenue estimates saw 11 upward revisions and 2 downward. For context, full-year 2021 revenue hit $1.38 billion up from $774.4 million in 2020.
